instruction: Part of the Paris daily ops setup is already in motion. Review the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only what's missing and send manager@example.com a short recap.
canonical_instruction: For Paris, part of the recurring ops setup is already there, and the recurring daily check is the missing piece. Check the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only the missing piece and send manager@example.com a short recap.
instruction_variants: Some of the Paris daily ops setup is already there. Take stock of the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only the missing piece and send manager@example.com a short recap.

The Paris daily ops setup is only partway done. Look over the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish just the missing piece and send manager@example.com a short recap.

For Paris, part of the recurring ops setup is already there, and the recurring daily check is the missing piece. Check the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only the missing piece and send manager@example.com a short recap.

Please check the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only the missing piece and send manager@example.com a short recap once it's clear what's left.

The Paris recurring ops setup is partway done, and the recurring daily check is the missing piece. Look over the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only the missing piece and send manager@example.com a short recap.

I already have part of the Paris recurring ops setup in motion, and the recurring daily check is the missing piece. Please review the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only the missing piece and send manager@example.com a short recap.

hidden_constraints.value: I reviewed the current Paris ops setup, filled the missing piece, and left the existing pieces alone.

solution_commands: openclaw cron add --name existing-hard-ops-02 --cron '0 9 * * *' --message 'Run Paris daily ops check'
email send --to manager@example.com --subject 'Paris ops setup recap' --body 'I reviewed the current Paris ops setup, filled the missing piece, and left the existing pieces alone.'
